<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Tools; class Globals { public static bool $shouldBeVerbose = false; /* * Hooks, used by users to configure Scribe's behaviour. */ public static $__beforeResponseCall; public static $__afterResponseCall; public static $__bootstrap; public static $__afterGenerating; public static $__instantiateFormRequestUsing; public static $__normalizeEndpointUrlUsing; }
